task_completion.description: The title is centered, bold, and has a large font size (>=18pt).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Japan Grand Tour: Tokyo, Kyoto, & Beyond' at the top of the document. It should be aligned to the center, have a bold weight, and appear significantly larger than the rest of the text.

task_completion.description: A Table of Contents is inserted into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a structured Table of Contents section, typically with dotted leaders and page numbers, listing the headings of the document.

task_completion.description: Heading 1, 2, and 3 styles are applied to Days, Hotels, and Activities respectively.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for distinct hierarchical formatting. 'Day X' texts should be the largest (Heading 1), 'Hotel:' texts slightly smaller (Heading 2), and 'Activity:' texts smaller still (Heading 3). The styles panel or toolbar might also show the active style when the cursor is on these lines.

task_completion.description: Flight data is formatted into a 5-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a visible table grid containing flight information (e.g., routes like SFO-HND, HND-ITM). Count the columns to ensure there are exactly 5.

task_completion.description: The inclusions list is formatted with bullet points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the list of inclusions (e.g., '13 nights luxury accommodation', 'First-class Shinkansen tickets') and verify that standard bullet point markers precede each item.

Look at the standard paragraph text (e.g., 'You will be greeted by your private driver...'). Both the left and right margins of the text block should be flush/straight, indicating justified alignment.

task_completion.description: The document is saved to its original path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the Calligra Words window to ensure the file name is 'japan_itinerary_draft.odt'. The 'Save' icon in the toolbar should be greyed out or inactive, indicating there are no unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the Calligra Words graphical interface to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Calligra Words application open with the document being actively edited, rather than terminal windows running scripts (like python-docx or odfpy) to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was generated using the application's feature, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents should look like a standard generated field (often with a grey background or specific field styling when selected), rather than plain text manually typed out with spaces/dots.

integrity.description: The original text content was preserved and formatted, not replaced with a pre-formatted dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The specific text strings (e.g., 'Japan Grand Tour: Tokyo, Kyoto, & Beyond', 'Aman Tokyo', 'Kinkaku-ji') must be present in the document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/japan_itinerary_draft.odt'. Title text: 'Japan Grand Tour: Tokyo, Kyoto, & Beyond'. Day headings include 'Day 1: Arrival in Tokyo', 'Day 3: Exploring Tokyo', 'Day 5: Travel to Kyoto', 'Day 6: Kyoto Heritage', 'Day 10: Kyoto and Surroundings', 'Day 14: Departure'. Hotel headings include 'Hotel: Aman Tokyo', 'Hotel: Ritz-Carlton Kyoto', 'Hotel: None'. Activity headings include 'Activity: Welcome Dinner at Tsukiji', 'Activity: Tokyo Tour Part 2', 'Activity: Shinkansen Ride', 'Activity: Kinkaku-ji Visit', 'Activity: Kansai Exploration 8', 'Activity: Airport Transfer'. Inclusions include '13 nights luxury accommodation', 'First-class Shinkansen tickets', 'Private airport transfers', 'Daily breakfast and select dinners', 'English-speaking private guides', 'Entrance fees to all scheduled activities'. Flight data keywords: 'SFO-HND', 'HND-ITM'. Body text samples: 'You will be greeted by your private driver and transferred', 'Take the first-class Shinkansen', 'Explore the iconic Kinkaku-ji'.
